title: event — declared entitlements
description: Seven entitlement keys. `sports_events` is the boolean master gate for the whole module. `event_slot` caps events per calendar year. `event_public_visibility` gates the public/tenant_only distinction (Medium+ can publish to public marketing pages). `event_livestream` gates the livestream_url/password columns (Medium+). `event_prize_pool` gates the prize_pool_cents column (Enterprise only). `event_multi_facility` gates attaching 2+ facilities to one event (Enterprise). `event_sponsors` gates the sponsors JSONB field (Enterprise).

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. All tiers get the module — even Small (a small academy still runs the occasional match / graduation). Small has hard slot caps; Medium + Enterprise progressively lift them. Off = the whole module is invisible: no event CRUD, no routes reachable, no reminders fire, no ResourceBookings compose through the event surface.
enforcedBy: EventObserver.creating refuses when the gate is closed (EVENT_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI resource surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'sports_events.core'

entitlements.description: How many Events a tenant can have IN ONE CALENDAR YEAR that the event overlaps. Small: 12 (one per month). Medium: 60 (roughly one per week). Enterprise: unlimited (null). Consumed on Event create; the accounting window is any calendar year that the event overlaps (an event crossing Dec-Feb counts against both years). Cancelled + archived events STILL count against their year (financial retention).
enforcedBy: EventObserver.creating consumes 1 unit via EntitlementGate::consume('event_slot', { calendar_years: overlapping })
EventObserver.deleted (hard-delete only — post-retention) releases the slot

entitlements.description: Enables `visibility='public'` — event appears on the tenant's public marketing page + external search. Medium + Enterprise. Small can still create events but only visibility IN (tenant_only, participants_only, private).
enforcedBy: EventObserver.creating refuses when visibility='public' and gate is closed (EVENT_PUBLIC_VISIBILITY_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
EventObserver.saving refuses visibility transitions to 'public' when gate is closed
SDUI create + edit screens hide the 'public' option when features array does not include 'sports_events.public_visibility'

entitlements.description: Enables `livestream_url` + `livestream_password` columns + the EventLivestreamActivated event. Medium + Enterprise. Small tenants who upload a URL get refused at the observer.
enforcedBy: EventObserver.creating refuses when livestream_url IS NOT NULL and gate is closed (EVENT_LIVESTREAM_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI create + edit screens hide the livestream fields when features array does not include 'sports_events.livestream'

entitlements.description: Enables `prize_pool_cents` + `prize_pool_currency` columns. Enterprise-only — most tenants don't run cash-prize competitions, and those that do are typically federation-tier tenants on Enterprise.
enforcedBy: EventObserver.creating refuses when prize_pool_cents IS NOT NULL and gate is closed (EVENT_PRIZE_POOL_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI create + edit screens hide the prize_pool fields when features array does not include 'sports_events.prize_pool'

entitlements.description: Enables attaching 2+ facilities to one Event (a large tournament across multiple courts). Enterprise-only. Small + Medium tenants can attach exactly 0 or 1 facility.
enforcedBy: EventFacilityObserver.creating refuses when the target event already has an active event_facilities row and gate is closed (EVENT_MULTI_FACILITY_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI event-facility surfaces refuse the second attachment when features array does not include 'sports_events.multi_facility'

entitlements.description: Enables the `sponsors` JSONB field. Enterprise-only — sponsorship is a federation / large-tournament feature.
enforcedBy: EventObserver.creating refuses when sponsors IS NOT NULL AND non-empty and gate is closed (EVENT_SPONSORS_NOT_ENTITLED, 402)
SDUI create + edit screens hide the sponsors editor when features array does not include 'sports_events.sponsors'
